product_overview: A local-first React app for searching, booking, and reviewing hotels and flights using an in-memory/test-auth backend. Users can authenticate with a test account, perform searches, simulate bookings (stored in localStorage), and submit reviews; admins can manage inventory.
core_goals: Provide a simple local environment to search and book hotels and flights without external services.
Allow users to authenticate with a test account and persist simulated bookings in localStorage.
Enable users to submit and view reviews for hotels and flights.
Provide an admin interface to add and remove hotels and flights.
Keep the app lightweight and runnable locally with minimal setup.

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate using a hardcoded test account (example@gmail.com / 123456789) to access protected routes.
user_flows: /login -> Fill email input field with example@gmail.com -> Fill password input field with 123456789 -> Click Login button to submit -> See redirect to /search
/login -> Fill email input field with wrong@example.com -> Fill password input field with wrongpass -> Click Login button to submit -> See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Hotel Search and Book
features.description: Search hotels by location, view results, and book a hotel; bookings are stored in localStorage and a success snackbar is shown.
user_flows: /search -> Switch to Hotels tab -> Enter location in Location field (e.g., 'Paris') -> See hotel results -> Click Book on a hotel card -> See success snackbar -> Booking stored in localStorage
/search -> Switch to Hotels tab -> Enter location in Location field with no matching results -> See 'no results' message

features.name: Flight Search and Book
features.description: Search flights by origin/destination, view results, and book a flight; bookings are stored in localStorage and a success snackbar is shown.
user_flows: /search -> Switch to Flights tab -> Enter From in From field -> Enter To in To field -> See flight results -> Click Book on a flight card -> See success snackbar -> Booking stored in localStorage
/search -> Switch to Flights tab -> Enter From/To that produce no matches -> See 'no results' message

features.name: Submit Hotel Review
features.description: Select a hotel, set a rating and comment, submit a review, and see it listed or confirmed via snackbar.
user_flows: /reviews -> Select hotel from dropdown -> Set rating with Rating component -> Enter comment -> Click Submit Review -> See review in list or snackbar
/reviews -> Select hotel from dropdown -> Leave rating or comment empty -> Click Submit Review -> See validation error snackbar

features.name: Submit Flight Review
features.description: Select a flight from the flights tab, set rating and comment, submit a review, and see confirmation.
user_flows: /reviews -> Switch to Flights tab -> Select flight from dropdown -> Set rating with Rating component -> Enter comment -> Click Submit Review -> See review in list or snackbar
/reviews -> Switch to Flights tab -> Select flight from dropdown -> Leave rating or comment empty -> Click Submit Review -> See validation error snackbar

features.name: Booking History
features.description: View a list of past bookings loaded from localStorage as booking cards with details.
user_flows: /history -> See loading state -> See list of booking cards with details from localStorage
/history -> See loading state -> See empty state message when no bookings exist

features.name: Admin Add Hotel
features.description: Add a new hotel via a form; the new hotel appears in the admin list after successful submission.
user_flows: /admin -> Fill Name field -> Fill Location field -> Fill Price field -> Fill Image URL field -> Fill Description field -> Click Add Hotel -> See hotel in admin list -> See success snackbar
/admin -> Fill Name field -> Fill Location field -> Leave Price field empty -> Click Add Hotel -> See validation error snackbar

features.name: Admin Delete Hotel
features.description: Remove an existing hotel from the admin list; deletion shows confirmation via snackbar and updates the list.
user_flows: /admin -> Locate hotel card in list -> Click Delete on a hotel card -> See snackbar confirming deletion -> See hotel removed from list
/admin -> Click Delete on a hotel card -> Simulate delete API failure -> See error snackbar and hotel remains in list

features.name: Admin Add Flight
features.description: Add a new flight via the admin flights form; the new flight appears in the admin list after submission.
user_flows: /admin -> Switch to Flights tab -> Fill Airline field -> Fill From field -> Fill To field -> Fill Price field -> Fill Image URL field -> Fill Description field -> Click Add Flight -> See flight in admin list -> See success snackbar
/admin -> Switch to Flights tab -> Fill Airline/From/To fields -> Leave Price field empty -> Click Add Flight -> See validation error snackbar

features.name: Admin Delete Flight
features.description: Remove an existing flight from the admin list; deletion shows confirmation via snackbar and updates the list.
user_flows: /admin -> Switch to Flights tab -> Locate flight card in list -> Click Delete on a flight card -> See snackbar confirming deletion -> See flight removed from list
/admin -> Click Delete on a flight card -> Simulate delete API failure -> See error snackbar and flight remains in list

features.name: Booking Page (Placeholder)
features.description: A placeholder booking page that indicates booking functionality is coming soon.
user_flows: /booking -> See 'Coming Soon' placeholder message
/booking -> Attempt to perform booking actions -> See 'Coming Soon' placeholder and no booking performed

routes.description: Search hotels and flights, book from results

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password (in-memory, test account example@gmail.com / 123456789)
user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Hotel Search and Book
features.description: Search hotels by location and book; booking stored in localStorage
user_interactions: Click Book on a hotel card
See success snackbar and optional Write Review

features.name: Flight Search and Book
features.description: Search flights by from/to and book; booking stored in localStorage
user_interactions: Click Book on a flight card

features.name: Submit Hotel Review
features.description: Select hotel, set rating and comment, submit review
user_interactions: See review in list or snackbar

features.name: Submit Flight Review
features.description: Select flight, set rating and comment, submit review

features.name: Booking History
features.description: View past bookings from localStorage
user_interactions: See loading then list of booking cards with details

features.name: Admin Add Hotel
features.description: Add new hotel via form; calls API
user_interactions: Fill Name, Location, Price (required), Image URL, Description
See hotel in list and snackbar

features.name: Admin Delete Hotel
features.description: Delete hotel from list
user_interactions: Click Delete on a hotel card
See snackbar and hotel removed from list

features.name: Admin Add Flight
features.description: Add new flight via form
user_interactions: Fill Airline, From, To, Price (required), Image URL, Description

features.name: Admin Delete Flight
features.description: Delete flight from list
user_interactions: Click Delete on a flight card

known_limitations.issue: Auth is in-memory only; no backend login API

known_limitations.impact: Actual booking happens on Search page
